children.feature_description: Map and manage outlet locations for sales reps — assigns outlets to reps and defines visit territories.
Product recommendations for sales reps — syncs recommendation data from the backend at startup.
Outlet visit plan for sales reps — syncs PJP data from the backend and stores locally for offline access.
Employee attendance marking and monthly dashboard. Tab 1: form-driven attendance submission (Working/Leave/Meeting). Tab 2: calendar view with monthly stats and status counts.
Record store check-in events for sales reps — tracks entry time, location, and outlet details.
Location-based boundary enforcement for outlet visits — validates that reps are physically present at the outlet.
Trade scheme visibility for sales reps — displays active promotional schemes applicable to outlets.
Inventory and stock management for outlets — track stock levels, returns, and replenishment requests.
Outlet credit limit and outstanding balance management — view credit status and payment history.
Sales incentive tracking for reps — displays earned incentives based on target achievement.
Invoice generation and history for outlet orders — view, share, and track invoice status.
Configurable survey forms for sales reps — collect outlet feedback and market intelligence data.
Rep competency and motivation assessment — managers can rate and track skill and will scores per rep.
Travel expense submission and approval workflow — reps log trips and claims for reimbursement.
End-of-day summary submission for reps — captures daily activity recap, visit count, and orders placed.
Journey plan creation and scheduling — reps or managers define outlet visit plans for upcoming days.
Track and report deviations from the planned journey — flags unplanned visits or missed outlets.
In-app support ticket creation and tracking — reps can raise issues and view resolution status.
Frequently asked questions and help content — searchable knowledge base for reps within the app.
